summary: Template Editor feature testing complete. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests PASSED. Frontend: All features working - Documents tab shows 17 doc types with 'Шаблон' badges, clicking opens code editor with HTML/Jinja2 template (14310 chars for quote), Preview tab renders with real order 7403 data showing company phone (097) 123 09 93 from DB. Save changes badge to 'Змінено (БД)', Reset returns to 'Оригінал (файл)'. DB override loader (DBOverrideLoader) correctly uses DB templates for rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ AdminPanel.jsx DocumentsTab (lines 210-440) - Template editor with code/preview tabs
✅ admin.py (lines 705-900) - Template CRUD endpoints with proper admin auth
✅ template_loader.py DBOverrideLoader - Checks DB first, file fallback
✅ company_config.py - Centralized company data from system_settings
✅ documents.py uses get_company_config() for document rendering
✅ 17 document types displayed in grid with 'Шаблон' badges
✅ Code editor shows character count (14310 символів for quote)
✅ Preview iframe renders template with order 7403 data
✅ Save/Reset flow works with proper badge transitions

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/templates/quote: PASS - Returns content (14310+ chars), source field
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/templates/quote: PASS - Saves to DB, returns success
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/templates/quote/reset: PASS - Deletes from DB, returns file content
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/templates/quote/preview?o: PASS - Renders HTML with company phone
backend_apis.GET /api/documents/estimate/7403/preview: PASS - Uses company data from DB

frontend_ui.click_opens_editor: PASS - Code editor opens with template content

db_override_loader.saves_to_db: PASS - Template stored in document_templates table
db_override_loader.uses_db_for_rendering: PASS - DBOverrideLoader returns DB content first

seed_data_creation: None - used existing templates and order 7403
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template Editor feature fully working. Admin Panel > Documents tab shows 17 document types. Click any card to open template editor with 'Код шаблону' (code) and 'Попередній перегляд' (preview) tabs. Save stores to document_templates table in DB, Reset deletes from DB. DBOverrideLoader in Jinja2 checks DB first before file system. Company data for documents comes from system_settings table via get_company_config().
